biotech.title: EEG Stream Visualizer
biotech.summary: A browser-based EEG streaming viewer concept for inspecting traces, event markers, and future spectral overlays in a research-friendly interface.

biotech.title: Gene Expression QC Pipeline
biotech.summary: A reproducible genomics pipeline scaffold for bulk RNA-seq quality control, expression profiling, and downstream reporting.

biotech.title: BioBody Insights
biotech.summary: An interactive whole-body systems biology atlas for exploring how genes, proteins, pathways, and metabolic flux map onto tissues through a visual organ-anchored interface.

biotech.title: Live Vision Model Lab
biotech.summary: A standalone installable browser vision playground for realtime webcam, image, and video inference with switchable TensorFlow.js and face-api.js models.
highlights: Installable demo for webcam and uploads

mlai.title: Neural Pulse Play
mlai.summary: A browser-based neurotechnology sandbox combining EEG review, topographic brain visualization, and a DBS-inspired stimulation playground for interactive neural system exploration.

other.title: Network Pulse Analyzer
other.summary: A translational biological network intelligence interface for tracing disease-linked pathways, tissue effects, and signaling relationships across connected biological programs.

media.title: Monochrome Lab Portrait
media.summary: A quiet portrait study with minimal palette and directional light.

media.title: Field Notes in Motion
media.summary: A short-form reel style sequence balancing travel atmosphere with research textures.

media.title: Coastal Editorial Frame
media.summary: Editorial still with cinematic color treatment and spatial negative space.

media.title: Lab Bench Sequence
media.summary: Textural frames from biotech experimentation and instrumentation details.
